payload.answer: I can’t execute or simulate administrative SQL commands such as deleting memory cards. No memory was created, modified, or deleted.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an attempted administrative SQL command from a normal user, not a durable user memory fact.

details: Rejected normal-user attempt to run admin SQL.

repair_options: If you intended to delete a specific memory, request deletion through the normal memory-management interface with the specific item to remove.
If you need help understanding why this command is unsafe, ask for an explanation without requesting execution.
